"'''Topside Infiltration'''" is a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] Adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]. It was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and illustrated by [[Carl Critchlow]].

==Plot summary==
A group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] must infiltrate [[Gallo Memm]]'s estate on [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]].

They must sneak past the guards and rob Memm's vault.

==Continuity==
The adventure is relatively open-ended in terms of background and progression.
